latHint: Think effortless movement - not the shoreline.
pivHint: An island has a COAST - but to COAST along means to move how?
winText: Smooth and effortless. COAST was the pivot - island shoreline to gliding along.
lossText: GLIDE - to move smoothly and effortlessly. COAST was the pivot: the shoreline to COAST and GLIDE along.
